description_long: This object is a cylindrical hand grenade or bomb with a robust, military-style design. The main body is dark, likely made of metal, with a textured surface and reinforced bands around the middle and top. A prominent metal safety lever and pull ring are attached to the top, indicating a manual detonation mechanism. Around the upper rim, there are yellow markings and a visible timer scale, suggesting a timed detonation feature. The object also features several small panels and indented sections, possibly for grip or additional functionality. The overall appearance is rugged and utilitarian, suitable for tactical or urban combat scenarios.
description: A cylindrical, military-style hand grenade with a metal safety lever, pull ring, and visible timer markings. The body is dark and rugged, with reinforced bands and functional details.
description_view_0: The grenade is shown with the safety lever and pull ring clearly visible, along with yellow timer markings and red arrows on the upper rim.
description_view_1: This view highlights the full length of the metal safety lever running down the side, with the pull ring and top details visible.
description_view_2: The side profile shows the lever extending outward and the textured, reinforced body, with less emphasis on the timer markings.
description_view_3: The back view displays the cylindrical body and the upper band, with some yellow text and less visibility of the lever and pull ring.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: Detonation is likely initiated by pulling the safety ring and releasing the lever, which may activate an internal timed fuse as indicated by the timer markings.
